name: Wars Island Management
description: Enter the realm of Wars Island Management, where players must forge their own army from scratch. Strategically build and train troops, fortify defenses, and manage resources wisely to strengthen your military might. Utilize funds to expand your forces, develop new technologies, and ultimately launch calculated attacks against rival armies. Website Developer <a href='https://www.crazygamesonline.comgame?'>https://www.crazygamesonline.comgame?</a>
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
tags: Army, Management, Mentolatux, unity games, War, WebGL
